Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The log shows three cases with variations The main flow appears to be Receive Application RA then Validate Form VF then Assess Eligibility AE then Approval Decision AD then Send Confirmation SC then Archive Case AC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: However there is also an optional loop Request Missing Info RMI and then re Validate Form VF This loop can happen multiple times case 3 has two RMI and two VF after the first VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 RA then VF then AE then RMI then VF then AD then SC then AC So after AE there is RMI then VF then AD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 RA then VF then AE then AD then SC then AC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 RA then VF then AE then RMI then RMI then VF then AD then SC then AC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The main flow is a sequence RA then VF then AE then optional loop then AD then SC then AC

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The pattern is after AE if there is any RMI then after the RMI events there is a VF and then AD If there is no RMI then directly AD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we need to model after AE a choice either go directly to AD or go into a subprocess that does one or more RMI then VF and then AD

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to ensure that the second VF is only executed if there is at least one RMI In case 2 there is no VF after AE

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can model one or more RMI using a loop star of RMI and tau because that gives repeated RMI while tau remains silent

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So after AE we can have an XOR between tau and a sequence of star of RMI and tau followed by VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If we choose tau then the trace becomes RA VF AE AD SC AC which matches case 2

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If we choose the sequence branch then one RMI followed by VF gives RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC which matches case 1

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If the loop repeats once then two RMI followed by VF gives RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC which matches case 3

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: This model generates exactly the observed traces and also allows more RMI repetitions which is acceptable for balancing fitness precision and simplicity

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So the final process tree is arrow RA VF AE X tau arrow star RMI tau VF AD SC AC
